strengths: 20 years of software engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems—exceeds 15-year requirement
Demonstrated technical leadership through Staff Engineer role, open-source platforms (GISCollective), and mentorship via workshops and talks
Broad full-stack and infrastructure expertise spanning TypeScript, Node.js, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, and multiple languages
concerns: AI expertise is recent (started at re:cinq April 2025) and operational—limited to MCP code generators and agent infrastructure, not strategic AI products or platforms
No Master's or PhD in AI, computer science, or related field; no research publications or recognized expertise in AI/ML domains
No evidence of strategic customer advisory work, identifying cutting-edge opportunities, or director-level impact on product vision and differentiation

key_factors.factor: Recent AI infrastructure exposure without strategic depth

response.justification: Szabo is a capable full-stack engineer with strong craftsmanship and 20 years of experience. However, the role explicitly requires a director-level specialist in AI strategy with recognized expertise, built products, and advisory experience. His AI work is recent and operational (infrastructure/tooling), not strategic. The absence of AI/ML education, published work, or products built with AI represents a fundamental gap for a principal engineer focused on identifying and implementing cutting-edge AI differentiation and advising strategic customers.
